Good morning, Flavia. Thank you for your time. Can you tell me about a normal day at your office?
Of course! I arrive at eight o'clock in the morning. I start with emails, and then I have meetings.
That is early! When do you have lunch, and when do you finish?
I have lunch at half past twelve. I take a short break in the afternoon, and I finish at six o'clock.
Perfect. I am in London, so we have a few hours of difference. Can we talk on Thursday, in the morning?
Yes! Thursday at ten o'clock is perfect. I write the appointment now, Thursday, ten in the morning.
I arrive at the office at eight o'clock in the morning.
I take a short break in the afternoon.
I finish work at six o'clock in the evening.
Can we talk on Thursday, at ten o'clock?

Hi Flavia, this is Paulo from the office. Here is the plan for tomorrow. We start at nine o'clock in the morning with a short meeting. At half past ten, you have an appointment with a new partner. Lunch is at one o'clock, and after lunch there is a workshop. Please arrive a few minutes early, because the room is small. We finish at five o'clock. Thank you, and have a good evening.

Good morning, everyone. This is a short reminder about our new office hours. From Monday, we open at eight o'clock in the morning and close at six o'clock in the evening. The lunch break is from twelve to one. On Friday, we finish early, at four o'clock. Please check your appointments and start your meetings on time. Remember, the workshop is on Wednesday, in the afternoon. Thank you, and have a great week.

First, Flavia arrives at the office at eight o'clock in the morning. Then she starts her day with emails and a short meeting. At half past twelve, she has lunch with a colleague. In the afternoon, she has an appointment with a new partner. She finishes at six o'clock and goes home in the evening.
